ocr_findings.description: '出る順！過去問&完全解説' in the image rendered as '[出る順/過去問&完全解説]' in OCR — exclamation mark replaced by slash, square brackets instead of orange badge box. Cosmetic; occurs on 4 rows.

reviewer_notes: Table of contents page covering chapters 11 (cont.) through 15, plus the 重要用語総復習 section and 索引 entry. All section codes, titles, and page numbers captured correctly. Bottom entry '寝る前10分&試験直前に効果的！重要用語を総復習！ 542' and '索引 551' both present. Same '出る順！' badge rendering issue as page_012, low severity.
